info.author: Zyneon Nexus
info.description: Zyneon+ Experimental allows you to play the Minecraft: Java Edition snapshot, pre-release and release-candidate versions in an optimized way.
info.name: Zyneon+ Experimental (testing, unstable)
info.summary: Zyneon+ Experimental allows you to play the Minecraft: Java Edition snapshot, pre-release and release-candidate versions in an optimized way.

meta.description: Zyneon+ Experimental allows you to play the Minecraft: Java Edition snapshot, pre-release and release-candidate versions in an optimized way. Not all features from the regular Zyneon+ version work in the experimental version. We try to update the pack as quickly as possible when new snapshot, pre-release, or release candidate versions are available, but we don't always manage to do so. It's quite possible that we might skip a few versions at times. Thank you for your understanding.
